content: Define the module TopModule with the specified interface including clk, reset, in, and out. Set up the input and output ports according to the specifications.
source: input  clk, input  reset, input  in (8 bits), output out (8 bits)

content: Implement a register to store the 8-bit input 'in'. This register should be updated on the positive edge of the clock and should be reset to zero when the reset signal is active high.
source: The module should implement an 8-bit registered incrementer. The 8-bit input is first registered and then incremented by one on the next cycle.

content: Implement combinational logic to increment the registered value by one. This logic will take the output of the register as input and compute the incremented value.
source: The 8-bit input is first registered and then incremented by one on the next cycle.

content: Connect the output of the combinational logic to the module output 'out'. This ensures that the incremented value is available as the module output.
